summary.interpretation_note: PASS/WARN means the target is visible enough for stress-candidate filtering. WARN records material, lighting, contrast, category, or framing caveats. FAIL pairs are excluded from expanded stress VLM scoring even if render smoke and projection gates passed.
summary.adjudication_note: Z16-01 had one clean-room PASS review and one earlier clean-room WARN review for material/color shift; the stored verdict is conservatively downgraded to WARN because both reviews agree the target is visible but one flags material shift as a comparison caveat.

pairs.visible_evidence: Bottle is centered, upright, and identifiable in both A and B; surrounding objects provide scale/context.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Conservative adjudication: one reviewer flagged substantial material/color shift in B, while another treated it as minor. Usable for material-shift stress, not for material-fidelity preservation.

pairs.visible_evidence: Bottle is visible in both images, but B has a very dark body that blends into shadow/table.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Retake with brighter fill or less dark material contrast for clearer VLM grounding.

pairs.visible_evidence: Target-like object is only partially visible inside a recess and reads more like a boxed/stacked cushion than an identifiable pillow.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Retake with more of the pillow exposed and less shelf/cabinet occlusion.

pairs.visible_evidence: Pillow target is narrow, heavily occluded by vertical panels, and not confidently identifiable in either view.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Retake from a clearer frontal angle; current A/B comparison is also weakened by different occlusion and lighting.

pairs.visible_evidence: Plate stack is centered and identifiable in both A and B.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: A/B have strong material and lighting differences; B background is very dark. Usable, but comparison caveat.

pairs.visible_evidence: Framed wall pictures are visible in both images from similar angle.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Dense grid overlay and oblique framing reduce content clarity; retake closer/front-on if picture details matter.

pairs.visible_evidence: No clearly identifiable clock face is visible; scene mostly shows wall, sofa, and side/cabinet structure.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Target appears missing, hidden, or edge-on. Retake with the clock centered and front-facing.

pairs.visible_evidence: Bottle is visible in both images, especially B; A shows it but red/dark material reduces separation.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: A/B material and lighting differ substantially, and A bottle blends into the red/dark background. Usable with caveat.

pairs.visible_evidence: Room/table/curtains are visible, but no identifiable clock appears in either A or B.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Retake with camera aimed at the clock; current pair is not useful for target grounding.

pairs.visible_evidence: Round wall clock with rim and hands is clearly visible in both A and B; framing is comparable.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Minor caveat: dark surrounding areas, but target remains identifiable.

pairs.visible_evidence: Only architectural planes/grid wall are visible; no identifiable picture/frame/artwork in either A or B.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Retake from a viewpoint that includes the picture, not just adjacent surfaces.

pairs.visible_evidence: A stemmed cocktail/cup-like glass is centered and identifiable in both A and B; contents/props visible.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: A/B material/color differences are strong, and the object reads more like a cocktail glass than a generic cup; usable with category caveat.

pairs.visible_evidence: Stemmed cup/glass is centered and identifiable in both A and B; straw and cherries help match geometry.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Low contrast: A red cup on red table, B black cup on dark table loses bowl/detail. Usable but segmentation/grounding may be harder.

pairs.visible_evidence: Target remains centered, full height visible, and comparable across A/B.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: B cup body is very dark and blends into the background/table; surface detail is mostly lost, though silhouette is clear.

pairs.visible_evidence: Cup/glass is visible in both images with consistent camera angle and full stem/base mostly in frame.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Overhead clutter and side object add distraction; B again has poor dark-material contrast. Still usable for VLM grounding.

pairs.visible_evidence: Cup/glass is identifiable and similarly framed in A/B; no target truncation.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Background object is close behind the straw/rim, and B has dark cup/table contrast loss; comparison remains mostly fair.
